seoTitle: Cambridge Gardens vs Cambridge Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cambridge Gardens and Cambridge Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cambridge Gardens vs Cambridge Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cambridge Gardens and Cambridge Park.
heading: Cambridge Gardens vs Cambridge Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cambridge Gardens, New South Wales and Cambridge Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cambridge Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Cambridge Park (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cambridge Gardens or Cambridge Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cambridge Gardens has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Cambridge Park scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cambridge Gardens scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Cambridge Park scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cambridge Gardens or Cambridge Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cambridge Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
